Namchun Renewables Co., Ltd. — Confidential Incident and IR Update — 2026-06-03 (KR)
On 3 June, Security detected unauthorized access to our ESG data room and limited exfiltration from a staging SFTP used by HR.
The affected files included training rosters with masked resident-registration numbers (주민등록번호; e.g., 9******-1******) and vendor contact lists; no payroll bank accounts were present.
Preliminary forensics indicate a compromised contractor VPN and a failed segregation between Capital Markets and Research drives, breaching our information barrier protocol.
Separately, Treasury is negotiating undisclosed commercial terms for a sustainability-linked note with Jebudo Capital (fictional), including a 10–15 bp coupon step-up tied to Scope 2 intensity metrics; this is MNPI under the FSCMA until KRX filing.
In parallel, our virtual-asset REC tokenization pilot paused after a hot-wallet policy exception was observed; no customer virtual assets are held, and keys remain in cold storage.
Per FSC/FSS guidance, we have notified the FSS cyber line within 24 hours and initiated a voluntary fair-disclosure review to assess selective disclosure risks to investors.
Effective immediately, an insider list has been compiled for the cyber event and REC tokenization workstream; a trading blackout window applies to listed equity and notes until public disclosure.
Mr. Lee Min-gyu, IR Director, will coordinate Q&A, and Ms. Han Soo-jin, CISO, owns containment; contact ir@namchunrenewables.co.kr or ciso@namchunrenewables.co.kr.
No evidence suggests manipulation of emissions baselines used in our 2025 sustainability targets, but we are validating meter data for the Incheon plant.
Employees are reminded that tipping or discussing the above commercial terms, cyber vectors, or tokenization pilot with analysts outside scheduled KRX disclosures is prohibited under internal policy and the FSCMA.
For educational purposes only, the attached primer explains our information-barrier standards and provides crypto-wallet definitions for new hires without referencing any live projects.
Operations will roll out a patched VPN client and re-segment shared drives by department by 7 June; this is a routine IT improvement and not related to any capital markets transaction.
We intend to make a voluntary disclosure on the KRX portal once scoping is complete, anticipated within five business days, subject to FSS feedback.
This document is internal to Namchun Renewables and Seorak Securities Advisory (fictional) and must not be forwarded; violators will be added to the insider list.
